hero.title: An AI copilot that reads, answers and automates any web page
hero.subtitle: More than a chatbot — it understands the page you're on and drives the browser for you when you need it.
hero.trust: Works with OpenAI · Gemini · LM Studio · Didim

p1.title: Rewriting what the page already says
p1.desc: You read a long article and still have to summarize it yourself.

p2.title: The same clicks, every day
p2.desc: Repetitive forms and workflows eat up your focus time.

p3.title: AI answers, you still execute
p3.desc: The chatbot replies — then you carry out the actual task.

p4.title: Per-site automation is a coding project
p4.desc: Writing scripts for each site is too heavy for daily work.

context.title: Page-context AI
context.desc: Reads the current page, selected text, input fields, screenshots and page structure together.
context.example: Article summary, auto-fill after field analysis

action.title: Browser action automation
action.desc: Turns natural-language requests into real browser actions.
action.example: Tab grouping, form filling, comment extraction

script.title: Script-based extensibility
script.desc: Tracks what you ran and evolves it into permanent scripts.
script.example: Site dark mode, ad area hiding

autofill.title: Doc & Form Auto-fill
autofill.desc: Assist with groupware docs and request forms

action.title: Action Tools
action.desc: GOTO · CLICK · FILL · EXTRACT and more

improve.title: Text Improvement
improve.desc: Polish text directly in input fields

floating.title: Floating Helper
floating.desc: Quick access right next to your selection

s1.title: Extend with per-site custom scripts
s1.desc: Dark mode, ad hiding, UI tweaks — register one-time scripts as permanent assets that auto-apply on every visit.

s2.title: Select a sentence → translate & ask
s2.desc: One drag to instantly translate and follow up with questions.

s3.title: Assisted document drafting
s3.desc: Analyzes forms, auto-fills fields, and lets you review.

s4.title: Tab cleanup & page navigation
s4.desc: Groups open tabs by topic and searches your browsing history.

d1.desc: Goes beyond answering — it operates the browser directly.

d2.desc: Turn a one-time task into a permanent script.

d3.desc: Works with page structure, input fields, tabs and scripts together.

demo.designSystemDesc: Phase 2 shared components (Section · Button · Badge) visual check
